aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Controlled fire

💼 Career: Tumhari leadership visible hogi, par impatience team issues create kar sakta hai

❤️ Love: Honest effort connection ko improve karega

💰 Money: Quick decision avoid karo

🧘 Advice: Slow power bhi power hoti hai

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum har race ko sprint samajh lete ho
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Secure rhythm

💼 Career: Steady effort ka reward milna start hoga

❤️ Love: Stability aur comfort relationship ko strong karega

💰 Money: Safe investment mindset beneficial hai

🧘 Advice: Change ko completely resist mat karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum comfort zone ko loyalty samajh lete ho
gemini:
♊ Gemini

🔥 Energy: Chaotic curiosity

💼 Career: Too many distractions productivity ko weak kar sakte hain

❤️ Love: Half-truths misunderstanding create karenge

💰 Money: Random spending regret la sakta hai

🧘 Advice: Simplify your priorities

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum excitement ke chakkar me consistency lose kar dete ho
cancer:
♋ Cancer
